Blonde specialist · Berlin Friedrichshain

Berlin Blonde, Done Right.

Soft. Seamless. Healthy. High-end blonding & balayage by Dennis Schneider.

★★★★★

“Dennis gave me the most seamless blonde I’ve ever had. Soft, expensive, and still incredibly healthy.”

★★★★★

“The tone was flawless — bright, refined, and never brassy. Truly premium work.”

★★★★★

“I’ve been blonde for years and this is by far the most natural and luxurious result I’ve had.”

★★★★★

“Every detail felt intentional. The consultation, the placement, the finish — all exceptional.”

★★★★★

“My balayage grew out beautifully and still looked polished weeks later.”

★★★★★

“He understands blonde on a completely different level. Elegant, modern, and precise.”

★★★★★

“The blend is so soft that people genuinely think it’s my natural color.”

★★★★★

“I left with brighter hair, healthier ends, and zero harsh lines.”

★★★★★

“The gloss gave my blonde that expensive, clean finish I had been looking for.”

★★★★★

“This was more than a salon visit — it felt calm, curated, and truly high-end.”

★★★★★

“My blonde has never looked this dimensional. The result feels effortless and elevated.”

★★★★★

“Perfect placement, beautiful tone, and such a refined overall experience.”

★★★★★

“He managed to lift and brighten my color without sacrificing the condition of my hair.”

★★★★★

“The final result was soft, luminous, and incredibly flattering.”

★★★★★

“I wanted understated luxury and that is exactly what I got.”

★★★★★

“The correction work was amazing. My color finally looks intentional and polished.”

★★★★★

“Everything about the service felt premium, from start to finish.”

★★★★★

“The grow-out is unbelievably soft. It still looks chic long after the appointment.”

★★★★★

“I have never trusted anyone more with my blonde. Worth every euro.”

★★★★★

“Healthy, dimensional, high-end blonde. Exactly what I hoped for.”

The experience

More than a salon visit.

From the moment you arrive, the focus is on calm, curated hair work. Every session is precise, unhurried, and designed to keep your blonde healthy for months.

  • Private, intentional environment
  • Precision work with soft, natural transitions
  • Long-term hair health and low-maintenance luxury

Mastery in Blonde

Blonde is not a color. It’s precision.

Hi, I'm Dennis – a self-employed master hairdresser and blonde specialist in Berlin Friedrichshain. For over 16 years, I've specialized in bleaching, balayage, lived-in looks, and natural, multidimensional hair color. If you're looking for a blonde expert in Berlin who combines high-quality results with healthy hair, you've come to the right place.


My focus is on modern techniques that allow for smooth transitions, clear blonde tones, and perfect nuances – all without compromising hair quality. Every color treatment is individually tailored to your hair type, your daily routine, and your long-term hair structure. I work with professional brands such as Olaplex, Evo Hair, Danger Jones and other high-performance products to guarantee you long-lasting, healthy and vibrant color results. Whether it's bleaching, balayage, root coloring, glossing or a complete color transformation: my goal is for you to leave my chair with a look that suits you – modern, individual and effortless.


Dennis Schneider is a Berlin-based master hairstylist and blonde specialist. From Friedrichshain, he builds natural, multi-dimensional blondes with a calm, considered approach.

  • 16+ years shaping blondes and lived-in color.
  • Every result is tailored to hair type, lifestyle, and long-term health.
  • No one-size-fits-all coloring. Only subtle luxury and clean transitions.

Premium Services

Blonde packages, gloss, and hair health rituals.

A curated selection of specialist blonding, colour and treatment rituals designed for effortless luxury and long-lasting results.

Style consultation

Are you unsure which look truly suits your style and lifestyle? We analyse your hair structure, wishes and possibilities in detail.

60 min€50.00

Extensions consultation

We assess extensions method, quality, length and blend for your hair. Honest advice on maintenance, longevity and the best option for you.

60 min€50.00
